text: AWS Shield - Advanced ummiconas @i * $3,000 per month (per ORG), 1 year lock-in + data (OUT) /m e Protects CF, R53, Global Accelerator, Anything Associated with EIPs (i.e EC2), ALBs, CLBs, NLBs e Not automatic - must be explicitly enabled in Shield Advanced or AWS Firewall Manager Shield Advanced policy ¢ Cost protection (i.e EC2 scaling) for unmitigated attacks e Proactive Engagement & AWS Shield Response Team (SRT)
